seasonality: Revenue is event-driven rather than seasonal, spiking with broader DeFi credit demand cycles and new vault/market launches on Morpho Blue (e.g., Base expansion in late 2024 drove a step-change in TVL).
rationale: DefiLlama shows Morpho TVL near $3.8 B as of late May 2025, up from ~$1.2 B at end-2023, reflecting rapid adoption of Morpho Blue and MetaMorpho vaults. Annualized protocol revenue is estimated at ~$63 M based on DefiLlama's trailing 30-day fee run-rate (~$5.25 M/month × 12); at a fully-diluted market cap of roughly $1.8 B (1 B tokens, ~$1.80 FDV price), the P/S is ~28.5× and P/TVL ~0.047×. Real yield to MORPHO stakers is not yet live in a formal revenue-share mechanism (governance controls fee switch), so real_yield_apr_pct and inflationary_yield_apr_pct are null pending fee-switch activation.
